description:
Calculate the maximum localized terrain settlement on an earthen dam by comparing the January baseline survey (C:\workspace\data\dam_survey_jan_baseline.csv) and the July current survey (C:\workspace\data\dam_survey_jul_current.csv) in TopoCal. Identify the geographic point (Easting X, Northing Y) with the greatest downward settlement magnitude. Record the coordinates and the settlement magnitude in meters to C:\workspace\data\max_settlement_report.txt using the following format:
Max Settlement X: [Value]
Max Settlement Y: [Value]
Settlement Magnitude: [Value] m
